title: Intensely Buttery Spanish Cream Crema Catalana
description: A buttery, molten, nostalgic Spanish dish featuring ground cinnamon, perfect for a high-protein dessert, formed into a traditional crema catalana.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the egg yolks, sugar, and salt.
Add the melted butter, ground cinnamon, and vanilla extract to the saucepan and whisk until combined.
In a separate saucepan, heat the heavy cream and whole milk over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Temper the egg yolk mixture by slowly pouring the warm cream mixture into the saucepan, whisking constantly.
Pour the mixture into 6 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let them cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled and set.
